name: Octagon
description: Clean octagons with grouted gaps, each tile re-glazing on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(30% 4%, 70% 4%, 96% 30%, 96% 70%, 70% 96%, 30% 96%, 4% 70%, 4% 30%); clip-path: polygon(30% 4%, 70% 4%, 96% 30%, 96% 70%, 70% 96%, 30% 96%, 4% 70%, 4% 30%); opacity: @rand(0.82, 1); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
